fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that the payment application will be posted to when you post the payment reconciliation journal.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number the payment application will be posted to when you post the payment reconciliation journal.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer or vendor ledger entry that the payment will be applied to when you post the payment reconciliation journal line.

fields.name: Applied
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the payment specified on the header of the Payment Application window is applied to the open entry.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the open entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that is related to the open entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that is related to the open entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the open entry.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the open entry.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the open entry.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Match Confidence
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quality of the match between the payment and the open entry for payment application purposes.

fields.name: Pmt. Disc. Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the remaining amount on the open entry must be paid to grant a discount.

fields.name: Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much discount you can grant for the payment if you apply it to the open entry.

fields.name: Pmt. Disc. Tolerance Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the latest date the amount in the entry must be paid in order for payment discount tolerance to be granted.

fields.name: Applied Amt. Incl. Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment amount, excluding the value in the Applied Pmt. Discount field, that is applied to the open entry.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the open entry.

fields.name: Remaining Amt. Incl. Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the open entry, minus any granted payment discount.
